commit_scope: Add a reversible native mutation public gate with route-local rollback receipts and no no-header traffic flip.

commands: cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py
local_validation.summary: native-mutation-public-gate.fk adds an X-Form-Native-Public-Gate recipe over the proven route-side-effect runner and persists public-gate rollback receipts in throwaway Postgres. production-routes.fk exposes explicit public-gate route rows for mutable ideas/spec paths, higher priority than preview when both headers are present, while no-header traffic remains fanout-python. mutation_public_gate_harness.py observed five mutation shapes with no-header fanout, preview-header non-executing preview, public-gate native selection, both-header public-gate priority, confidence 1.0, and ordinary_traffic_flip_performed=false.

known_limitations.observed: No ordinary no-header POST/PATCH/DELETE mutation traffic moved. No-header traffic still fans out to FastAPI.

Public-gate HTTP responses keep executes:false. The header gate executes and emits a rollback receipt shape; DB receipt persistence is proven in the Form live-PG fixture, not claimed for the HTTP route.
No production application database writes were attempted.
No public deploy attempted. The next boundary is a deployed X-Form-Native-Public-Gate canary before any no-header flip.

ci_validation.notes: Pending push of this stacked branch and GitHub checks on a draft PR.

deploy_validation.notes: No public deploy attempted. Ordinary no-header public mutation traffic remains on FastAPI.

e2e_validation.expected_behavior_delta: Form can now persist public-gate rollback receipts for native mutation route runners, and the production router manifest can select X-Form-Native-Public-Gate routes while preserving fanout for no-header traffic and preview behavior for X-Form-Native-Preview.
test_flows: python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_public_gate_harness.py --json -> 5/5 cases passed, confidence 1.0, public_gate_header_allowed=true, ordinary traffic flip remains false
python3 deploy/kernel-router/mutation_ab_observation_harness.py --json -> 5/5 cases passed, confidence 1.0, next evidence names deployed public-gate canary

cd api && python3 -m pytest -q tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> 33 passed

cd api && python3 -m ruff check tests/test_native_mutation_public_gate.py tests/test_native_mutation_ab_observation.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_side_effect_binding.py tests/test_native_mutation_route_bindings.py tests/test_ideas_router_form.py tests/test_spec_registry_router_form.py -> All checks passed
python3 scripts/generate_repo_indexes.py --check -> All indexes up to date
make wellness -> maps aligned and every claimed symbol resolves

phase_gate.reason: Public-gate local proof is complete; CI, deploy, and deployed header-gated canary evidence remain pending before any no-header flip.
